scripts.dev: npm --prefix taller install --include=dev && npm --prefix taller run dev
scripts.build: npm --prefix taller install --include=dev && npm --prefix taller run build && node scripts/sync-next-output.js
scripts.start: npm --prefix taller install --include=dev && npm --prefix taller run start
scripts.lint: npm --prefix taller install --include=dev && npm --prefix taller run lint
